mapper.select: select report_id from shop_verification_report where status = 'PUBLISHED' and ai_score_status = 'PENDING' and ai_score_attempts < #{maxAttempts} and (ai_score_next_retry_at is null or ai_score_next_retry_at <= sysdate()) order by coalesce(ai_score_next_retry_at, published_at), report_id limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update shop_verification_report set ai_score_status = 'RUNNING', ai_score_version = #{promptVersion}, ai_score_input_hash = #{inputHash}, ai_score_attempts = ai_score_attempts + 1, ai_score_next_retry_at = null, ai_score_updated_at = sysdate() where report_id = #{reportId} and status = 'PUBLISHED' and ai_score_status = 'PENDING' and ai_score_attempts < #{maxAttempts} and (ai_score_next_retry_at is null or ai_score_next_retry_at <= sysdate())
mapper.insert: insert into shop_verification_report_ai_score (report_id, status, model_provider, model_name, prompt_version, input_hash, started_at, create_time) values (#{reportId}, 'RUNNING', #{modelProvider}, #{modelName}, #{promptVersion}, #{inputHash}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_verification_report_ai_score set status = 'SUCCEEDED', score = #{score}, reason = #{reason}, dimensions_json = #{dimensionsJson}, error_message = null, completed_at = sysdate() where score_id = #{scoreId} and status = 'RUNNING'
update shop_verification_report_ai_score set status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = sysdate() where score_id = #{scoreId} and status = 'RUNNING'

update shop_verification_report_ai_score set status = 'FAILED', error_message = '评分任务执行超时，已重新排队', completed_at = sysdate() where status = 'RUNNING' and started_at < date_sub(sysdate(), interval #{runningTimeoutMinutes} minute)

update shop_verification_report set ai_score_status = case when ai_score_attempts < #{maxAttempts} then 'PENDING' else 'FAILED' end, ai_score_next_retry_at = case when ai_score_attempts < #{maxAttempts} then date_add(sysdate(), interval #{retryDelaySeconds} second) else null end, running_ai_score_id = null, ai_score_updated_at = sysdate() where status = 'PUBLISHED' and ai_score_status = 'RUNNING' and ai_score_updated_at < date_sub(sysdate(), interval #{runningTimeoutMinutes} minute)

update shop_verification_report set ai_score_status = 'PENDING', ai_score_attempts = 0, ai_score_next_retry_at = null, running_ai_score_id = null, ai_score_updated_at = sysdate() where report_id = #{reportId} and status = 'PUBLISHED' and ai_score_status != 'RUNNING'

update shop_verification_report set ai_score_status = 'PENDING', ai_score_attempts = 0, ai_score_next_retry_at = null, running_ai_score_id = null, ai_score_updated_at = sysdate() where status = 'PUBLISHED' and ai_score_status != 'RUNNING' and (current_ai_score_id is null or ai_score is null)
